name: Infernity Pawn
name_jp: インフェルニティ・ポーン
desc:
During your Draw Phase, if you have no cards in your hand, instead of conducting your normal draw: You can banish this card from your GY, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Place 1 "Infernity" card from your Deck on top of your Deck.
● Set 1 "Void" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
